ITEM.name: Golden Tophat (Event)
ITEM.desc: LegacyGamers congratulatates you!

ITEM.name: Event Winner Sword
ITEM.desc: A nimble great sword that has all the characteristics of a katana.

ITEM.name: Event Winner's Rocket
ITEM.desc: Congratulations on winning our event.

ITEM.name: Naruto Sound Headband
ITEM.desc: This headband would be found on Naruto

ITEM.name: Naruto Sound Headband
ITEM.desc: This headband would be found on the Naruto

ITEM.name: Cobra Hat
ITEM.desc: Hat made out of Cobra skin.

ITEM.name: Cobra Long Coat
ITEM.desc: Wearing this gives you the speed and strength of a Cobra.

ITEM.name: Assassin Jacket
ITEM.desc: Ninja's are familiar with this jacket.

ITEM.name: Assassin Gloves
ITEM.desc: Ninja's use these gloves for speed and agility.

ITEM.name: Cobra Gloves
ITEM.desc: These gloves give the speed and strength of a Cobra.

ITEM.name: Assassin Trousers
ITEM.desc: Ninja's are familiar with this item.

ITEM.name: Cobra Trousers
ITEM.desc: These trousers give the speed and strength of a Cobra.

ITEM.name: Assassin Boots
ITEM.desc: Ninja's are familiar with these boots.

ITEM.name: Cobra Boots
ITEM.desc: These boots gives the speed and strength of a Cobra.

ITEM.name: The Martyr's Dagger
ITEM.desc: The omega dagger.

ITEM.name: Quick Dagger
ITEM.desc: Some people just can't handle the speed.

ITEM.name: Quick Blade
ITEM.desc: Some players just can't handle the speed.

ITEM.name: Premium Grenades
ITEM.desc: For those who enjoy thier grenades.

ITEM.name: Premium Grenades MK II
ITEM.desc: For those who enjoy thier grenades, newly improved!

ITEM.name: Promise Ring
ITEM.desc: Gives hope for the journey ahead.

ITEM.name: Luxury Ring
ITEM.desc: Provides elegant strength to continue your quest.

ITEM.name: Fortune Ring
ITEM.desc: Ring guides those to greater wealth.

ITEM.name: Ring of Power
ITEM.desc: With great power comes great responsibility.

ITEM.name: Almighty Ring
ITEM.desc: A true master may equipt this ring.

ITEM.name: Legacygamers Weight Ring
ITEM.desc: Weight FTW?

ITEM.name: Legacygamers Ultra!
ITEM.desc: Thanks for donating, this ring is the best of the best!

ITEM.name: LegacyGamers Bonus
ITEM.desc: You're awesome This ring gives so much more to you and it's yours!

ITEM.name: Thanks for Donating!
ITEM.desc: Donation Item.

ITEM.name: Staff Nail Gun
ITEM.desc: Event Only.

ITEM.name: Staff Slow Element
ITEM.desc: Event and Non-Public Use Only.

ITEM.name: Staff Fast Element
ITEM.desc: Event and Non-Public Use Only.
